summary: REQ-1 appears implemented in TestimonialsPage.tsx via a fixed full-viewport background image with cover/center/no-repeat and a translucent blurred overlay to preserve readability. REQ-2 is not satisfied because the required static image asset file was not added in the diff. Additionally, non-requested metadata files were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the new generated background image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename and reference it from TestimonialsPage.tsx via /assets/generated/....
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files, so the required image asset cannot be present at the specified path/filename.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx (references /assets/generated/im-fine-bg-testimonials-butterfly-sunrise.dim_1920x1080.png, but no corresponding added asset file in diff)

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt with descriptions of many files/pages unrelated to the Testimonials background change.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly scopes changes to the Testimonials page background treatment; updating this summary file (and including unrelated page descriptions) was not requested.
Not requested by BuildRequest; the request is limited to the Testimonials page background and adding a static asset.
